ddls:
CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter (e.g., Package Body Dimension X) */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol associated with the parameter (e.g., A) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the parameter (e.g., µm) */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the parameter belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the parameter */,
  "tolerance" REAL /* Tolerance range for the parameter */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if the parameter is mandatory for the package */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameter_values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each value */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter the value belongs to */,
  "value_type" TEXT /* Type of value (e.g., minimum, nominal, maximum) */,
  "value" REAL /* Actual value */,
  "tolerance" REAL /* Tolerance range for the value */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if this is the default value for the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameter_values_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES parameters ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "package_types" (
  "package_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each package type */,
  "package_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the package type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the package type */,
  "standard_id" TEXT /* ID of the industry standard the package type adheres to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "packages" (
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each package */,
  "package_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package type the package belongs to */,
  "package_name" TEXT /* Name of the package */,
  "standard_id" TEXT /* ID of the industry standard the package adheres to */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manufacturer */,
  "production_date" TEXT /* Date of production */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the package (e.g., in production, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_packages_package_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_type_id") REFERENCES package_types ("package_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "package_parameters" (
  "package_parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each package-parameter association */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package the parameter belongs to */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter */,
  "is_critical" INTEGER /* Indicates if the parameter is critical for the package */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the parameter was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_parameters_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES parameters ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_parameters_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameter_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "standard_id" TEXT /* ID of the industry standard the category adheres to */,
  "is_mandatory" INTEGER /* Indicates if the category is mandatory for all packages */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameter_units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol associated with the unit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the version */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date of approval */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, quality control, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the package */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the package was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to access the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameter_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter the comment belongs to */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Actual comment or note */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the comment was created */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "is_important" INTEGER /* Indicates if the comment is important */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameter_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameter_comments_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES parameters ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "package_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package the comment belongs to */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Actual comment or note */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the comment was created */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "is_important" INTEGER /* Indicates if the comment is important */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_comments_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameter_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the version */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date of approval */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameter_history_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES parameters ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trail" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit record */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table the change was made to */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record the change was made to */,
  "field_name" TEXT /* Name of the field that was changed */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the field */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the field */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to make the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES parameters ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)
